etymology.description: Depicts leaves growing from a tree -> Original form of и‘‰(и‘‰) (yГЁ, "leaf") -> Borrowed for жћј(жћј) (pinyin, "flat")
etymology.interpretation: The character жћј depicts leaves on a tree to represent the concept of a leaf. However, it was later borrowed phonetically to express the notion of flatness, showing the evolution of its usage over time.
